name: The Drop Zone | Golf Simulators and Sports Bar
about: The Drop Zone is a golf simulator venue and sports bar in Buffalo, New York. It utilizes brand-new 2024 ForeSight Falcon simulators, positioning itself as Western New York's premier golf bar. The facility offers a combination of indoor golf simulation, food and beverage service, and organized leagues. Pricing is based on hourly rentals for simulator time and membership plans for frequent players.
why_golfers_like_it: Uses premium 2024 ForeSight Falcon simulators, the most used brand by professional golfers for highly accurate readings
Offers a full sports bar atmosphere with food and drinks available while playing
Features organized leagues and a membership program for regular play and social engagement

food_and_drink.notes: Offers a variety of pub foods that can be enjoyed while watching sports on TVs.
Features a 40-foot long sports bar with 5 TVs, offering draft and bottled beer, seltzers, wine, liquor, energy drinks, and Pepsi products.

simulator_hardware.notes: Brand-new 2024 ForeSight Falcon simulators, described as providing the most accurate readings on the market.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The Drop Zone offers its own variety of pub foods and beverages from its sports bar, including draft and bottled beer, seltzers, wine, liquor, and food items.

faq.answer: The provided content does not specify the time required to play 18 holes. This information may vary depending on the simulator software and pace of play.
